mapper.select:
SELECT id, switch_valve_device, switch_valve_tag, status, switch_valve_name, switch_valve_model, switch_valve_manu, switch_valve_location, switch_valve_med_name, switch_valve_med_temp, switch_valve_med_press, switch_valve_press_after, switch_valve_material, switch_valve_body_material, switch_valve_seat_sn, switch_valve_seat_material, switch_valve_core_material, switch_valve_stem_material, switch_valve_flow_char, switch_valve_leak_class, switch_valve_actuator_type, switch_valve_actuator_model, switch_valve_actuator_manu, switch_valve_actuator_action, switch_valve_actuator_stroke, switch_valve_spring_range, switch_valve_air_press, switch_valve_fault_pos, switch_valve_close_time, switch_valve_open_time, switch_valve_remark, dv_type, factory FROM switch_valve
AND switch_valve_tag LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.switchValveTag}, '%')
AND status = #{queryParams.status}
AND dv_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.dvType}, '%')
AND factory LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.factory}, '%')

SELECT switch_valve_device, switch_valve_tag, status, switch_valve_name, switch_valve_model, switch_valve_manu, switch_valve_location, switch_valve_med_name, switch_valve_med_temp, switch_valve_med_press, switch_valve_press_after, switch_valve_material, switch_valve_body_material, switch_valve_seat_sn, switch_valve_seat_material, switch_valve_core_material, switch_valve_stem_material, switch_valve_flow_char, switch_valve_leak_class, switch_valve_actuator_type, switch_valve_actuator_model, switch_valve_actuator_manu, switch_valve_actuator_action, switch_valve_actuator_stroke, switch_valve_spring_range, switch_valve_air_press, switch_valve_fault_pos, switch_valve_close_time, switch_valve_open_time, switch_valve_remark, dv_type, factory FROM switch_valve
AND switch_valve_tag LIKE CONCAT('%', #{switchValveTag}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND dv_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dvType}, '%')
AND factory LIKE CONCAT('%', #{factory}, '%')
